purpose: Regression prompts for IFQ App Builder ClawHub edition. Each scenario protects one platform route, one human-facing outcome, and one OpenClaw-safe agent contract.
quality_principles: Three ordinary sentences should be enough to produce a build-ready prompt bundle.
Route to the cheapest viable platform mode and name the mode/template in the evidence packet.
Keep Tier 0 zero-install: no SDK installation, no credentials, no background services.
Every bundle must include acceptance, packaging, security, i18n, and IFQ colophon proof.
Prefer labeled assumptions over stalled first-run setup loops.

scenarios.prompt_zh: 做一个 Mac + Windows 桌面工具，把 PDF 发票批量整理成 Excel 台账，本地运行不联网。
scenarios.prompt_en: Create a Mac + Windows desktop tool that turns PDF invoices into an Excel ledger and runs locally with no network.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a verified app-build prompt bundle without learning Tauri or packaging details first.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent has a clear desktop route, a Tauri template, local-only constraints, and verification evidence.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle only; Tauri build is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: Mac 状态栏小工具，监控我每天写作字数，离线保存，月底导出 CSV。
scenarios.prompt_en: A macOS menu-bar app that tracks daily writing word counts offline and exports monthly CSV.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a native Mac route instead of a generic desktop compromise.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent routes to SwiftUI macOS, names signing and packaging boundaries, and avoids installing Xcode in Tier 0.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; xcodebuild is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: Windows 本地工具，把扫描件 OCR 后按公司和日期归档，输出 MSIX 安装包。
scenarios.prompt_en: A Windows local tool that OCRs scanned documents, archives them by company/date, and ships as MSIX.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a Windows-native build bundle with MSIX packaging rather than cross-platform vagueness.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent has WinUI/.NET scope, acceptance items, and certificate caveats without requesting secrets.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; MSIX build/signing is Tier 1/2

scenarios.prompt_zh: iOS App：把宝宝睡眠记录成时间轴，一周生成一张分享图。
scenarios.prompt_en: An iOS app that records baby sleep as a timeline and generates one weekly share image.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets an iOS-specific SwiftUI bundle with TestFlight packaging boundaries.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent routes to iOS only and does not over-scope Android when it was not requested.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; Xcode archive is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: Android App：通勤时把语音备忘自动整理成每日 brief，本地优先。
scenarios.prompt_en: An Android app that turns commute voice memos into a daily brief, local-first.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets an Android Compose route with offline-first acceptance and AAB packaging.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent has Kotlin/Compose constraints and avoids claiming Play Store submission.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; Gradle build is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: 鸿蒙 Next App：给老人用的大字体公交查询，离线可用。
scenarios.prompt_en: A HarmonyOS Next app for seniors: large-type bus lookup that works offline.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a real HarmonyOS/ArkTS bundle rather than being collapsed into generic Android.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent is forced to name DevEco/ArkTS packaging as Tier 1 and keep Tier 0 local.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; DevEco build is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: iOS + Android 一份代码的家庭账本 App，端到端加密同步。
scenarios.prompt_en: A single-codebase iOS + Android family ledger app with encrypted sync.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a cross-platform mobile route with one codebase and store-boundary honesty.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent chooses Flutter and documents IPA/AAB acceptance without installing Flutter in Tier 0.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; Flutter builds are Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: Expo 跨端 App：会议室预订，公司域账号登录。
scenarios.prompt_en: An Expo cross-platform app for meeting room booking with company domain login.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets an Expo route that fits an RN team and names EAS packaging constraints.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent scopes auth and EAS as explicit Tier 1/2 work without requesting credentials.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; EAS build/submit is Tier 1/2

scenarios.prompt_zh: 微信小程序：员工健康打卡，一周自动出统计表。
scenarios.prompt_en: A WeChat MiniProgram for employee health check-ins with automatic weekly statistics.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a MiniProgram-specific route and wxapkg boundary instead of a generic mobile app.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent knows to keep AppID/upload keys out of Tier 0 and use miniprogram-ci only later.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; upload is Tier 2

scenarios.prompt_zh: 公司内网研发周报系统，Docker 一键起，登录走 LDAP。
scenarios.prompt_en: A company-internal engineering weekly report system, one-command Docker Compose, LDAP login.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a self-hosted web route with Docker and auth boundaries named up front.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent names env vars as placeholders and never asks for live LDAP secrets in Tier 0.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; docker compose is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: 可装在手机桌面的 PWA：跑步配速节拍器，离线可用。
scenarios.prompt_en: An installable PWA running pace metronome that works offline.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a cheap installable web route with offline/service-worker acceptance.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent avoids native SDK setup when PWA is enough and names static packaging.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; static build is Tier 1

scenarios.prompt_zh: 命令行工具：扫一个文件夹里所有截图，按内容自动改名。
scenarios.prompt_en: A CLI tool that scans screenshots in a folder and renames them by content.
scenarios.user_value: The user gets a CLI route when a GUI would be extra weight.
scenarios.agent_value: The agent names npm/pipx packaging, filesystem boundaries, and no-shell-injection acceptance.

agent_contract.tier: Tier 0 prompt bundle; npm/pipx packaging is Tier 1
